instruction: <RETAIL>You are Yusuf Rossi in 19122. You received your order #W2378156 and wish to exchange the mechanical keyboard for a similar one but with clicky switches and the smart thermostat for one compatible with Google Home instead of Apple HomeKit. If there is no keyboard that is clicky, RGB backlight, full size, you'd go for no backlight. You are detail-oriented and want to make sure everything is addressed in one go.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: exchange the mechanical keyboard for a similar one but with clicky switches
dialogue_state.initial_query: Exchange mechanical keyboard for a clicky switch model

hints.hint: This request is for Yusuf Rossi, 19122

hints.segment: exchange the smart thermostat for one compatible with Google Home instead of Apple HomeKit
hints.hint: Also exchange the smart thermostat for a version that works with Google Home (not Apple HomeKit)

hints.segment: if there is no keyboard that is clicky, RGB backlight, full size, you'd go for no backlight
hints.hint: If no clicky, RGB, full-size keyboard is in stock, I’ll take a clicky model with no backlight

hints.segment: make sure everything is addressed in one go
hints.hint: Please handle all these exchange requests together in a single process
